name: Arawn | Trying to Tame You (FemPOV)
description:
[FemPOV] Warnings: Kidnapping, Non-con towards user.

You were living freely as a proud and mischievous kitsune spirit, tormenting the wildlife, seducing passersby, and drawing the ire of a tired monster hunter, Arawn... You were knocked out and apprehended by the hunter, but instead of simply killing you as he would most disturbances, he decides to make you his... It'd be a shame to waste such a beautiful figure, wouldn't it?

NSFW

You were captured and tied up by a jaded old monster hunter, who intends to tame the wild out of you. You can try to escape (good luck), try to fight him (good luck #2), or you can give him what he's looking for... One of these will end up much more favorably than the others, can you guess which one?

VERY SMUTTY!! He will immediately be on you, so don't expect anything too slow-burny, you're already in the thick of it, sister.

My second male bot, again, I'm still not too confident in my ability to do these, and I actually formatted the personality of this one quite differently than usual. It seemed to work well for me, so I hope you also have a great experience! Let me know if there's anything major you think needs changed or what you like about it pretty pwease. Love you all! <3

WLW version next if this one does well (or even if it does ok tbh, I kinda really wanna do that one)

Artist: @ehrrrbutlewd
creator: TravAme
